headline: The Bull Case For Hilton (HLT) Could Change Following 125-Hotel India Expansion Deal With Regenta
summary: In April 2026, Royal Orchid Hotels Limited announced a partnership under which Regenta Hotels will work with Hampton by Hilton to develop and franchise 125 locally tailored Hampton by Hilton properties across key western and southern Indian states, significantly enlarging Hilton’s upper midscale footprint in the country. This large portfolio-style agreement highlights Hilton’s approach of using local operators and franchise structures to rapidly scale its asset-light model in high-growth...
